titleStmt.title: SII 30.40: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 40. (A.R. No. 117 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha temple-on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Vīrarājēndra: year 27: 1233 A.D.

summary.p: Built in. It records that Avināsi alais Ellāmvalla Sōḻakkar made a gift of three āṉai achchu Srīyakki-paḻañsalāgai achchu and three paṇam for the persons bringing 50 pots of water daily for bathing the god. Three persons who received the gift agreed to provide the same out of the interest of the endowed amount.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kovirācakecari panmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvīrarācentira te
ḻuttiṭṭuc cellā ninṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu Irupatteḻāvatu cittirai mātam mutal vaṭapari
cevūrilirukkum kaikkoḷaril kā ḷ Avināciyāṉa Ellāmvalla coḻakkar Āḷu
ṇṭi nāyanāṟkut tirumañcaṇam Aimpatiṅkuṭam nāḷonṟukku Eṭuppānukku puṭavai mu
ṉ Āṉai Accuc ciṟiyakki paḻañcalākai Accu mūnṟum paṇammūnṟum meṟpaṭi naṭa
lirukkum taṭṭāril paṟaiyan coṇṭanāṉa cenāpati taṭṭānum viraṭṭan coṟanāṉa valla cu
pūm naṭuviṟpūmanum Immuvom Āḷuṭaiyār tirumurukanpūṇṭināyanār cīpaṇṭārattil te kai
yyāliyāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭava Āṉaiyaccuc ciṟiyakkipaḻañcalākai Accu mūnṟum paṇamu
ṭom koṇṭapaṭiyāvatu Ivvaccukkup palicai Acciṉvā y tiṅkaḷ kunṟip pon pa
kavum Ēṟiṉa palicaikku Āṇṭonṟukku Oru Accup peṟapporai puṭavai koṇṭu
kavum Itu paḻaṅkācu patilum tirumurukanpūṇṭiyilum Eṅkaḷil munninṟār Ippalicai piṭiccu
Itu cantirātittavarai Eṅkaḷ makkaḷ celuttuvomāka Itu cempilum cilaiyilum ve ..
Digital edition of SII 30.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
